page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tool uses information from PubMed's database, provided by the NCBI through the EUtils web service, to produce a search interface focused on browsing, organising and gathering information from the biomedical literature.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This tool uses information from PubMed's database, provided by the NCBI through the EUtils web service, to produce a search interface focused on browsing, organising and gathering information from the biomedical literature.
